# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

variables:
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION: "30 days"
  BUILD_DIR: "build"
  CONFIG_DIR: "config"
  BINARY_NAME: "myapp"

build:compile:
  stage: build
  image: gcc:latest
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}
    - gcc -o ${BUILD_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} src/main.c
    - chmod +x ${BUILD_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}
    - echo "Build completed at $(date)" > ${BUILD_DIR}/build-info.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/build-info.txt
    expire_in: 30 days
  tags:
    - docker

build:config:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - echo "DATABASE_URL=postgres://db:5432/mydb" > ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "LOG_LEVEL=info" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "PORT=8080" >> ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    expire_in: 30 days
  tags:
    - docker

build:assets:
  stage: build
  image: node:18
  script:
    - npm install
    - npm run build
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR}/assets
    - cp -r dist/* ${BUILD_DIR}/assets/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/assets/
    expire_in: 30 days
  tags:
    - docker

test:unit:
  stage: test
  image: gcc:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  script:
    - ls -lah ${BUILD_DIR}
    - file ${BUILD_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}
    - ./${BUILD_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} --version || true
    - echo "Running unit tests"
  tags:
    - docker

test:integration:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
    - build:config
  script:
    - ls -lah ${BUILD_DIR} ${CONFIG_DIR}
    - cat ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf
    - echo "Running integration tests with config"
  tags:
    - docker

package:bundle:
  stage: package
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
    - build:config
    - build:assets
  script:
    - mkdir -p package/bin package/config package/assets
    - cp ${BUILD_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME} package/bin/
    - cp ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf package/config/
    - cp -r ${BUILD_DIR}/assets/* package/assets/
    - tar -czf ${BINARY_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz package/
    - sha256sum ${BINARY_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz > checksums.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BINARY_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz
      - checksums.txt
    expire_in: 30 days
    name: "${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
  tags:
    - docker

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - package:bundle
  script:
    - echo "Downloading artifacts from package stage"
    - ls -lah
    - cat checksums.txt
    - tar -xzf ${BINARY_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz
    - ls -lah package/
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment"
    - chmod +x package/bin/${BINARY_NAME}
    - echo "Binary location: $(pwd)/package/bin/${BINARY_NAME}"
    - echo "Config location: $(pwd)/package/config/app.conf"
    - package/bin/${BINARY_NAME} --config package/config/app.conf --dry-run || true
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - develop
  tags:
    - docker

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  dependencies:
    - package:bundle
  script:
    - echo "Downloading production artifacts"
    - ls -lah
    - sha256sum -c checksums.txt
    - tar -xzf ${BINARY_NAME}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz
    - echo "Deploying to production environment"
    - chmod +x package/bin/${BINARY_NAME}
    - cp package/config/app.conf /etc/myapp/
    - cp package/bin/${BINARY_NAME} /usr/local/bin/
    - echo "Starting application"
    - package/bin/${BINARY_NAME} --config package/config/app.conf --start || true
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
  only:
    - main
    - tags
  tags:
    - docker

deploy:download-artifacts:
  stage: deploy
  image: curlimages/curl:latest
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
    - build:config
    - build:assets
  script:
    - echo "Artifacts available for team download"
    - ls -lah ${BUILD_DIR}/
    - ls -lah ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    - echo "Binary: ${BUILD_DIR}/${BINARY_NAME}"
    - echo "Config: ${CONFIG_DIR}/app.conf"
    - echo "Assets: ${BUILD_DIR}/assets/"
    - echo "Artifacts retained for ${ARTIFACT_RETENTION}"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_DIR}/
      - ${CONFIG_DIR}/
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
  when: always
  tags:
    - docker
